metadata.description: Native-first, low-friction companion plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: task-queue
plugins.description: Resume bridge + auto-advance for Claude Code's native task list — re-surfaces a repo's unfinished tasks from earlier sessions and points the model at the next unblocked task as each one completes.

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Tidy-as-you-touch: formats and lint-checks the file you just edited (fixing what's safe) so an active project converges toward clean code over time, scoped to the touched file. MVP targets Go.

plugins.name: charter
plugins.description: Know the project: gates substantive work on documented quality attributes, maintains a committed Claude-facing roadmap/backlog file (cross-session/engineer coordination), and keeps a project map (file→responsibility index) so a session orients from the map instead of re-scanning the tree. Generates the docs from the codebase/git history when missing.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: A consolidated status line: animated beacon, open tasks + in-progress, paused state, quality-attributes status, last tidy action, tokens up/down, git branch, and model — read-only from existing plugin state, zero model-token cost.
